ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transaction_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction manager */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction manager */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the transaction manager was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction manager */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the transaction manager was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction manager the configuration belongs to */,
  "process_id_socket_binding" TEXT /* Name of the socket binding configuration to use */,
  "default_timeout" TEXT /* Default timeout value */,
  "process_id_socket_max_ports" TEXT /* Maximum number of ports to search for an open port */,
  "relative_to" TEXT /* Path to reference a global path configuration */,
  "process_id_uuid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether to use a UUID-based process ID */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., socket-based, UUID-based) */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES transaction_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socket_bindings" (
  "binding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socket binding configuration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the socket binding configuration */,
  "port" TEXT /* Port number for the socket binding */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used by the socket binding (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("binding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each global path configuration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the global path configuration */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the global path configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the global path configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the configuration setting */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the configuration setting was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the configuration setting (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_history" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration setting */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration setting */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction manager the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., seconds, milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES transaction_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction log */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction manager the log belongs to */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES transaction_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration setting */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration setting */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the session */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session started */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ended */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical configuration setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting at a specific point in time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the configuration setting was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)
